content:
# Hazard Index

**Summary**: A calculation used to determine the potential for non-cancer health effects from chemical exposure.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] calculated Hazard Indices (HI) and Hazard Quotients (HQ) to assess human health risk.

## Scientific Context

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] Used to determine if the concentration of pollutants poses an immediate threat to human health.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025]] Calculated using average concentrations from dispersion models.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Fuel shifting reduced the HI by 72.4%, significantly mitigating health risks. ([[2025-al-afif|Al-Afif, 2025, p. 58]])
